scripts.db:migrate: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/001_init.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/002_extend_class_codes.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/004_asset_assessment.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/005_connectors.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/006_connector_link_template.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/007_extend_class_codes_lender.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/008_asset_class.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/009_lci_schema.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/010_drop_class_code_check.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/011_engagement_and_families.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/012_entity_link.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/013_move_equipment_fields_to_attributes.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/014_asset_history_on_insert.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/015_findings_merge.sql
scripts.db:reset: PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d postgres -c 'DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS asset_dev' && PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d postgres -c 'CREATE DATABASE asset_dev' && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
